sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105150" key="tripodaba/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐποδ-ᾰβάκιον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰκ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄβαξ</etym>) <sense id="n105150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">three-legged stand,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάδον</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
